title: Crypsinus okamotoi

Crypsinus okamotoi is native to the Himalayas and is often found growing on trees in shaded areas. The species is relatively rare and is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and degradation. Further research is necessary to fully understand the classification and conservation status of Crypsinus okamotoi.
